title: BRAT
creator: Charli XCX
note: Pure momentum. I've shipped more code to this album than I'd like to admit.

title: GNX
creator: Kendrick Lamar
note: Dense and layered — each listen reveals something new. The kind of record that rewards attention, which is rare.

title: MAGDALENE
creator: FKA twigs
note: A beautifully fractured record about grief and transformation. Best listened to at 2am when you're deep in a hard problem.

title: Isles
creator: Bicep
note: My default focus playlist. Emotional electronic that never gets in the way — just pulls you deeper into the work.
